2604.15780.title: Pruning Unsafe Tickets: A Resource-Efficient Framework for Safer and More Robust LLMs
2604.15780.paper_summary: Machine learning models are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, but even aligned models such as Mistral and LLaVA still exhibit unsafe behaviors inherited from pre-training. Current alignment methods like SFT and RLHF primarily encourage models to generate preferred responses, but do not explicitly remove the unsafe subnetworks that trigger harmful outputs. In this work, we introduce a resource-efficient pruning framework that directly identifies and removes parameters associated with unsafe behaviors while preserving model utility. Our method employs a gradient-free attribution mechanism, requiring only modest GPU resources, and generalizes across architectures and quantized variants. Empirical evaluations on ML models show substantial reductions in unsafe generations and improved robustness against jailbreak attacks, with minimal utility loss. From the perspective of the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis, our results suggest that ML models contain "unsafe tickets" responsible for harmful behaviors, and pruning reveals "safety tickets" that maintain performance while aligning outputs. This provides a lightweight, post-hoc alignment strategy suitable for deployment in resource-constrained settings.
2604.15780.paper_summary_zh: 機器學習模型在現實世界的應用中越來越普遍，但即使是像 Mistral 和 LLaVA 這樣的對齊模型仍然表現出從預訓練中繼承的不安全行為。當前的對齊方法如 SFT 和 RLHF 主要鼓勵模型生成首選回應，但並未明確去除觸發有害輸出的不安全子網絡。在這項工作中，我們介紹了一種資源高效的修剪框架，該框架直接識別並去除與不安全行為相關的參數，同時保持模型的效用。 我們的方法採用無梯度的歸因機制，只需少量 GPU 資源，並且在架構和量化變體之間具有良好的通用性。對機器學習模型的實證評估顯示，不安全生成的顯著減少和對越獄攻擊的增強魯棒性，且效用損失最小。從彩票票據假設的角度來看，我們的結果表明，機器學習模型包含負責有害行為的「不安全票據」，而修剪揭示了「安全票據」，這些票據在對齊輸出的同時保持了性能。這提供了一種輕量級的事後對齊策略，適合在資源受限的環境中部署。
2604.15780.author: Wai Man Si et.al.
2604.15780.authors: Wai Man Si, Mingjie Li, Michael Backes, Yang Zhang
